testcase.name: a link item with a resolved preview displays the preview title and thumbnail
a resolved preview with a blank title falls back to the item title but keeps the thumbnail
a resolved preview with no thumbnail still shows the preview title without a thumbnail
an unresolved preview link item shows the raw link instead of a preview
a link item with no preview shows the raw link
an image item never surfaces its file path; it shows the description
an image item with no description shows no subtitle (never the file path)
a video item with no description shows no subtitle (never the file path)
